description: run a SimPy resource-monitoring demo and report utilization/queue/wait stats
rules: deterministic — fixed process durations (BASE_DURATION + i), no RNG
monkey-patches request/release on a capacity-CAPACITY Resource to track queue, utilization, wait time
report written to record_store/monitor_report.txt; per-event CSV to record_store/monitor_data.csv
usage: Set NUM_PROCESSES, CAPACITY, BASE_DURATION. Output: monitor_report.txt (+ monitor_data.csv).
limitation: Requires the simpy package at run time; when absent the porter writes a placeholder and exits 0. Demonstrates monitoring on a single Resource only.
